elements.text:
Your car broke down so a friend is dropping you off at a meeting. As they drop you off, they are really loud and everyone in there looks at you. 

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I'm instantly feeling ashamed of my loud friend, but remind myself that I can't control what they do.
I'm eager to get to the meeting and see people.
I'm so embarrassed by my friend.
I'm nervous about what the people at the meeting might say, but they seem really nice and accepting.
